email_subject: Application for Internal Sales Medewerker at VIVALDIS
email_body:
Dear VIVALDIS team,

I am writing to apply for the Internal Sales Medewerker position at VIVALDIS in Heverlee. With a strong commercial drive and a passion for the food industry, I am confident I can contribute to your sales team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I maintain daily client contact via phone and email, manage follow-ups, and spot commercial opportunities. I am structured, persistent, and enjoy building relationships with customers. My experience in logistics at Katoen Natie taught me discipline and accuracy in a fast-paced environment.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am eager to bring my communication skills and commercial mindset to VIVALDIS.

I look forward to discussing my application further.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear VIVALDIS team,

I am excited to apply for the Internal Sales Medewerker position at VIVALDIS in Heverlee. As a junior digital marketer with a strong commercial drive and a genuine passion for food, I am eager to contribute to your sales team and help build lasting customer relationships.

In my current role at Episto, I manage client communication daily via phone and email, follow up on inquiries, and proactively identify opportunities to upsell or improve service. I am disciplined in maintaining structured follow-ups and accurate administrative records, ensuring that no lead is left unattended. My experience in a high-volume logistics environment at Katoen Natie further honed my ability to work efficiently under pressure while maintaining attention to detail.

I am a true foodie and feel at home in the hospitality sector. I enjoy connecting with people and am persistent in reaching out until I get a response. I am fluent in English and Turkish, and I am actively improving my Dutch (currently A2). I am comfortable with digital tools and can quickly adapt to new CRM systems.

I am looking for a role where I can combine my commercial drive with my love for food, and VIVALDIS seems like the perfect place. I am available to start immediately and would love to discuss how I can add value to your team.

Thank you for considering my application.

Warm regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

## Profile
Junior digital marketer with a strong commercial drive and a passion for food and hospitality. Experienced in daily client contact via phone and email, structured follow-ups, and proactive opportunity spotting. At Episto, I manage client relationships, track performance, and ensure accurate administrative follow-up. Quick to learn new tools and platforms, with a disciplined approach to customer management. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: A2, currently taking classes.

## Core Skills
- Client communication & follow-up: daily phone/email contact, structured follow-ups, proactive opportunity spotting
- Commercial drive: persistent in reaching out, building relationships, and closing follow-ups
- Administrative accuracy: organized record-keeping, order processing, and CRM management
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration

## Experience

### Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Maintain daily client contact via phone and email, managing inquiries and follow-ups
- Proactively identify commercial opportunities and suggest solutions to clients
- Track client interactions and ensure accurate administrative follow-up
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

### Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

### Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

## Projects

### mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

## Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

## References
Available on request.
